title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If fixed, it becomes a known mileston
content:
✔ If fixed, it becomes a known milestone but loses unpredictability.

2. Should the Holy Grail be a one-time-use item or a permanent buff?

✔ If one-time-use, it remains powerful but temporary.
✔ If permanent, it may imbalance the game.

3. Should the professor’s veto always be absolute, or can it be challenged by the class?

✔ If absolute, it maintains order but removes some player agency.
✔ If challengeable, it allows for checks and balances but introduces more debate.

🚀 Version 6.7 now finalizes curse nullifications, a mid-semester shake-up, structured literary items, and the Scribe’s editorial system.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.8 – FINAL LOCK-IN: Chaos Event Theming, The Weekly Heavenly Item, Dynamic Professor Roles, and Locked Systems
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 353 (chunk 353/555)
